action.reasoning: Observation: torch_geometric causes SIGSEGV/std::bad_alloc on import - incompatible C extensions. All 5 previous iterations failed because of this. Analysis: Must implement GNN from scratch using native PyTorch only (scatter_add_, custom collate_fn). Decision: Rewrite model.py with manual GINEConv + global_mean_pool, rewrite train.py and predict.py without any torch_geometric imports. Train 5 epochs for baseline.
